meaning: adj.坚硬的,冷酷的,强硬的,严峻的,含燧石的,强硬的,严峻的,燧石似的
examples: A narrow and flinty grand rue wound up a short incline.
It was not a round pebble like the first, but a three-cornered one with sharp, flinty points.
The protection of these historic cities is faced with the flinty challenge and good opportunity.
His weak spots are supposedly money, organization, a flinty personality and past inflammatory comments.
This was partly because the participants' list was replete with flinty-eyed generals and senior intelligence types.
